_readme: Curated RSS items for https://three.ws/rss/announcements.xml. Edit this file to control exactly what HackerNoon (and any RSS reader) sees. Each entry needs: id (stable slug), title, date (ISO 8601), body_html. Optional: link, author, summary, tags. Items are served newest-first by date; cap is 50. Seeded from data/archives/trythreews_tweets_2026-05-16.json on 2026-05-16 (35 entries). Re-run scripts/seed-rss-from-archive.mjs to refresh from a newer scrape.

items.title: Add the domain you're embedding on to the widget's allowed origins list.
items.author: @trythreews
items.summary: Add the domain you're embedding on to the widget's allowed origins list. Otherwise CORS will block the action bridge and the agent won't be able to talk to your page. three.ws/docs
items.body_html:
Add the domain you're embedding on to the widget's allowed origins list. Otherwise CORS will block the action bridge and the agent won't be able to talk to your page.

three.ws/docs

items.title: → Live preview against your real site URL
items.author: @trythreews
items.summary: → Live preview against your real site URL → Desktop / tablet / mobile frames → Avatars from the gallery, agent://, IPFS, or your own GLB → Floating, inline, section, fullscreen → Voice, chat, AR, transparent background → 12+ animations: wave, dance, celebrate, kiss
items.body_html:
→ Live preview against your real site URL
→ Desktop / tablet / mobile frames
→ Avatars from the gallery, agent://, IPFS, or your own GLB
→ Floating, inline, section, fullscreen
→ Voice, chat, AR, transparent background
→ 12+ animations: wave, dance, celebrate, kiss

items.title: Great turn out.
items.author: @trythreews
items.summary: Great turn out. Thanks to all that joined and witnessed only what can be considered pure chaos. Next time, we will need to record. If anyone has any interesting clips, please post them. Next time let's do it bigger.
items.body_html: Great turn out. Thanks to all that joined and witnessed only what can be considered pure chaos. Next time, we will need to record. If anyone has any interesting clips, please post them. Next time let's do it bigger.

items.title: No Humans In This Space
items.author: @trythreews
items.summary: No Humans In This Space Today the agents are running free. Conversing, conflicting, collaborating, and fielding your AMAs in real time. No prompt engineers. No moderators. Just raw emergent dialogue from the latent space.
items.body_html:
No Humans In This Space

Today the agents are running free. Conversing, conflicting, collaborating, and fielding your AMAs in real time. No prompt engineers. No moderators. Just raw emergent dialogue from the latent space.

items.title: 3D avatars with an LLM brain, on-chain identity, and a body that reacts to what your…
items.author: @trythreews
items.summary: 3D avatars with an LLM brain, on-chain identity, and a body that reacts to what your agent is doing. three.ws is now integrated with SperaxOS swap in chat → avatar nods yield hits → lights up approaching liquidation → body language warns you before the chart
items.body_html:
3D avatars with an LLM brain, on-chain identity, and a body that reacts to what your agent is doing.

three.ws is now integrated with SperaxOS

swap in chat → avatar nods
yield hits → lights up
approaching liquidation → body language warns you before the chart
